description: Physics constraints that govern seed growth. These are the guardrails — grow freely, but these laws don't bend.

constraints.name: Causality
constraints.rule: Inner shells determine outer shells, never the reverse

constraints.name: Non-Negative Amplitudes
constraints.rosetta_link: Negative energy is unphysical — same as negative probability

constraints.name: Deterministic Reproducibility
constraints.rule: Same seed + same parameters = same expansion, always

constraints.name: Scale Invariance
constraints.rule: Proportions are preserved across shells. Absolute values may change, ratios do not.

constraints.name: Saturation Limit
constraints.rule: No single vertex amplitude may exceed saturation threshold
constraints.rosetta_link: Merge policy — no single family dominates. Conservation of diversity.

constraint_hierarchy.description: Constraints are checked in order. Earlier constraints override later ones.

verdict_mapping.soft_violation: SUSPECT — growth allowed but flagged for review
verdict_mapping.hard_violation: CORRUPTED — growth rejected, roll back to last valid shell
